description_long: This house is a modern, multi-story residential building with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The facade features large, continuous glass windows framed by white and gray structural elements, providing ample natural light to the interior. The upper level includes three distinct rooftop structures, likely skylights or penthouse rooms, each with their own windows. The ground level is elevated on columns, creating a sheltered entryway and a sense of openness. The property is bordered by a neatly trimmed green lawn and paved walkways leading to the main entrances. The overall aesthetic is minimalist, with a focus on horizontal and vertical lines, and the use of glass and concrete materials.
description: A modern, multi-story house with large glass windows, flat roof, and minimalist white and gray exterior. Features rooftop structures, elevated entry, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, three rooftop structures, and dual walkways leading to the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, glass corner windows, and the separation between rooftop structures.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid wall, minimal windows, and visible rooftop structures.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open corridor between rooftop structures and the glass corner feature.
attribute_window_arrangement: large continuous glass panels with symmetrical rows on the front, minimal windows on the rear
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features dual walkways, steps, and is sheltered by an overhang supported by columns, with a minimalist glass door.
